message:

function.arguments: {"command": "# Check config vars for PSM/power grid checking\ngrep -n \"VCCD\\|VSSD\\|PSM\\|QUIT_ON_POWER\\|VDD_NET\\|VSS_NET\\|POWER_GRID\" \\\n    /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/steps/openroad.py 2>/dev/null | head -30"}
function.name: execute_bash

content: 1817:            "Map of power and ground nets to OpenROAD PSM location files. See [this](https://github.com/The-OpenROAD-Project/OpenROAD/tree/master/src/psm#commands) for more info.",

extras.command:
# Check config vars for PSM/power grid checking
grep -n "VCCD\|VSSD\|PSM\|QUIT_ON_POWER\|VDD_NET\|VSS_NET\|POWER_GRID" \
    /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/steps/openroad.py 2>/dev/null | head -30
